package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_logs_with_http_status_or_route_labels: Repositories that log transport metadata instead of persistence-domain details.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule128NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule128NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule128NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario128Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule128NegativeService, input Rule128NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
